exercises.source: 호수의 물이 내 가슴 높이까지 왔다.
acceptableAnswers: The water in the lake was as high as my chest.
The lake water came up to my chest.
The water of the lake was as high as my chest.
hints: The water in the lake was as high as my ____.

exercises.source: 거친 땅 때문에 내 발이 아팠다.
acceptableAnswers: The rough ground hurt my feet.
My feet hurt because of the rough ground.
The rough ground made my feet hurt.

exercises.source: The girl saw a spider and screamed.
acceptableAnswers: 소녀는 거미를 보고 비명을 질렀다.
그 소녀는 거미를 보고 비명을 질렀다.
소녀가 거미를 보고 소리를 질렀다.

exercises.source: 나는 시험을 잘 봤다는 자신감이 있다.
acceptableAnswers: I have confidence that I did well on the test.
I am confident that I did well on the test.
I have confidence that I did well on the exam.
hints: '시험을 잘 보다'는 'do well on the test'입니다.
I have ____ that I did well on the test.

exercises.source: My teeth are sensitive to cold things.
acceptableAnswers: 내 치아는 차가운 것에 예민하다.
내 이빨은 차가운 것에 민감하다.
나의 치아는 차가운 것들에 예민하다.

exercises.source: 매년 우리는 나라를 위해 싸우다 돌아가신 분들을 기린다.
acceptableAnswers: Each year we honor those who died fighting for their country.
Every year we honor those who died fighting for their country.
We honor those who died for their country every year.
hints: Each year we ____ those who died fighting for their country.

exercises.source: 밖이 더워서, 소년은 나무 그늘에 앉았다.
acceptableAnswers: It was hot outside, so the boy sat in the shade of a tree.
Because it was hot outside, the boy sat in the shade of a tree.
The boy sat in the shade of a tree because it was hot outside.
hints: It was hot outside, so the boy sat in the ____ of a tree.

exercises.source: Due to the dark clouds, there was a threat of a bad storm.
acceptableAnswers: 먹구름 때문에, 심한 폭풍우가 닥칠 조짐이 있었다.
어두운 구름 때문에 심한 폭풍의 위협이 있었다.
먹구름으로 인해 심한 폭풍우의 조짐이 있었다.
hints: 먹구름 때문에, 심한 폭풍우가 닥칠 ____이 있었다.

acceptableAnswers: Eating good food builds up your strength.
Good food builds up your strength.
If you eat good food, your strength builds up.
hints: Eating good food builds up your ____.

exercises.source: I was a victim of a robbery.
acceptableAnswers: 나는 강도 사건의 피해자였다.
나는 강도의 피해자였다.
나는 강도 사건 피해자였다.
